/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -fno-lifetime-dse -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-nonnull -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-noexcept-type -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wno-misleading-indentation -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/na3758/MLIR-RL/MyASTGenerator/build/lib  -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/AstDumper.dir/ast_dump.cpp.o -o bin/AstDumper
